data.title: Interactive Brokers Reports Mixed Q1 Results, Declares 4-For-1 Forward Stock Split
data.description: Interactive Brokers releases its first-quarter results after Tuesday's closing bell. Here's a look at the key figures from the report.

data.title: Counterfeit Ozempic Identified in US Supply Chain With Fake Labels And Needles, FDA Alerts
data.description: FDA and Novo Nordisk warn about counterfeit Ozempic in the U.S. with fake serial numbers, posing risks due to unknown contents and unverified sterility.

data.title: Options Corner: This SoFi Technologies Put Spread Offers Zero Parallax And A Big Payout
data.description: Amid a challenging environment for SoFi Technologies, astute traders may consider this favorably priced options play for SOFI stock.

data.title: ASML Approaches End Of China Backlog, Eyes Growth in AI and Advanced Chip Demand
data.description: Dutch exports to China dropped in March, ASML Holding neared clearing backlog from China. EUV market to reach $35.70 billion by 2032 with 15.1% CAGR. Chinese researchers develop N-polar GaN wafer, could speed up tech adoption. ASML's Q1 net bookings estimated at 4.89 billion euros.
